sentences.text: Thad and Theo had a thin tusk on the path.
Theo got a thin raptor and Thad fed a moth.
Thad and Theo met a thin armor in the shed.
A thin raptor sat with Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad and Theo dug a thin egg with Seth.
Theo fed a thin armor and Thad had the tusk.
A thin swift raptor ran with Thad and Theo.
Theo and Thad fed a thin herd in the shed.
Thad got a thin herd and Theo got the fossil.
Thad and Theo set a thin tusk at the path.
A thin raptor met Thad and Theo on the path.
Theo and Thad set a thin tusk with Seth.
Thad let Theo dig a thin fossil at the path.
Theo had a thin tusk and Thad got the armor.
A thin raptor hid with Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad and Theo dug a thin armor at the path.
Theo and Thad set a thin armor at the shed.
Thad fed a thin herd and Theo got the fossil.
A swift thin herd ran with Thad, Theo, and Seth.
Thad and Theo set a thin herd at the path.
